title: Command FeedBack
description: Standalone datapack to silently disable command feedback. Supports all Minecraft 1.16+ versions.
body:
# MuteFeedback Dependency Code: `iJ7xtSs0`

MuteFeedback is a standalone datapack that silences command feedback and command block output.  
It prevents chat spam from `/trigger` or other automated commands while keeping your custom messages intact.  
Perfect for clean chat in singleplayer or multiplayer worlds.  
Compatible with all Minecraft 1.16+ versions.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Why Use It?
* Keep chat clean while testing commands or running other datapacks.
* Use as a dependency for future packs.
* Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.
* Mod/Datapack Creator can use for there own project as well!

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Compatibility.
* Compatible with **Minecraft 1.16+**
* Automatically silences unnecessary command spam while leaving custom messages like `tellraw` or `title` intact!

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Commands Affected</summary>
/datapack *, /give, /clear, /setblock, /fill, /clone, /tp, /summon *, /effect *, /enchant, /replaceitem, /datapack list, /trigger, /gamerule, /time *, /weather, /scoreboard *, /data *, /execute, /function, /advancement, /recipe, /title, /bossbar, /tellraw & more..
</details>

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Image Demo
When any datapack or mod uses a `/trigger` or similar command, it can flood the chat with “Executed command…” messages.

**Demo video:**  
[Watch on YouTube at 0:30]([https://youtu.be/86prO8jZnvM](https://youtu.be/86prO8jZnvM?t=31))
**Example screenshot:**  
![Command feedback flood example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a62eee45b8c45c0a765856d7071ebecf54a8ff_0.webp)

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Installation
1. Download the zip and place it in your `datapacks` folder
2. Yep Thats it, It works automaticlly when world load!

### Uninstallation
1. Go to your `datapacks` folder and locate `DisableCommandFeedback-X.zip`
2. Delete it or move it out of the `datapacks` folder. 
3. Run `/gamerule commandBlockOutput true` in Minecraft to restore default feedback!
